experience.title: Information Technology Specialist

experience.title: IT Systems Administrator
experience.description: Responsible for all maintenance on 55 Windows variant based workstations, Dell Precision server, IBM xSeries Blade server, the telephony/VOIP/POTS systems, T1/network troubleshooting in a multi-building environment as well as providing end user assistance and training to sales, service and management teams.

experience.title: Field Service Technician II
experience.description: Perform field service work on IBM servers, IBM/Lenovo desktops and IBM Point-of-Sale POS) equipment as well as repair Lexmark monochrome and color laser printers.

experience.title: Kodak Imaging Expert / Field Marketing Specialist

experience.title: Merchandising / Marketing Specialist

experience.title: Digital Imaging Specialist

experience.title: Business Machines Sales Associate
